# dependencytrack_license_group (Data Source)

Fetches a license group from Dependency-Track by UUID or name. Exactly one of `id` or `name` must be specified.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up a license group by name
data "dependencytrack_license_group" "by_name" {
  name = "Copyleft"
}

# Look up a license group by UUID
data "dependencytrack_license_group" "by_id" {
  id = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) The UUID of the license group. Exactly one of `id` or `name` must be specified.
- `name` (String) The name of the license group. Exactly one of `id` or `name` must be specified.

### Read-Only

- `risk_weight` (Number) The risk weight of the license group
